meaning: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)
a sending down (subject of this verse)
The One who shows complete and endless mercy (connected to مِّنَ before it)
The intensely and constantly merciful (possessed by/connected to something)
it was detailed/explained (referring to ءَايٰتُهُۥ - His verses)
as a recitation (describing how the verses were detailed/explained)
they know (referring to a group who should understand)
a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنَا)
then he turned away (subject of أَكْثَرُهُمْ)
our hearts (subject of قَالُوا - they said)
from what (that تَدْعُونَآ you call us to)
so work! (in response to their rejection)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
like you all (describing أَنَا۠ بَشَرٌ - I am a human)
a god (one of many possible gods)
and all of you seek His forgiveness! (plural command)
for those who join partners with Allah
those who reject faith (predicate of هم)
and they worked/did (connecting their belief with their actions)
cut off/ended (describing a reward that is unending)
is it indeed you all? (questioning the plural audience)
in/by/with the one who (connects to خَلَقَ - created)
he created (subject of creating the earth in يَوْمَيْنِ)
two days (time period in which اللَّهُ created the earth)
and you all make/set (as rivals to اللَّهِ)
and He made/placed (connected to previous actions about Earth's creation)
mountains (because they are firmly fixed in the earth)
in it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
and he measured out precisely (the provisions in فِيهَآ أَقْوٰتَهَا)
its provisions (referring to the Earth's sustenance)
and then he said (connected to ٱسْتَوَىٰٓ)
to it/her (referring to السَّمَاء - the sky)
and to the earth (object of قَالَ)
both of you come! (command to two - addressing the sky and earth)
willingly (describing how the heavens and earth responded to Allah's command ائتيا)
unwillingly (describing how the heavens and earth came in response to Allah's command)
they both (f) said (referring to السَّمَآء and الْأَرْض)
and then He completed/decided them (feminine plural)
and he caused to be revealed/inspired
in/within (connects يَوْمَيْنِ to the previous verb فَقَضَىٰهُنَّ)
its command/matter (referring to each heaven mentioned in فَقَضَىٰهُنَّ سَبْعَ سَمٰوَاتٍ)
the worldly life, this world (as opposed to the hereafter)
and a protection (being done to the sky)
the precise measuring (of العَزِيزِ - the Mighty)
The All-Knowing (One) (attribute of Allah mentioned in تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ)
then if (connects this condition to what came before)
they turned away (subject of فَقُلْ - so then say)
then say! (command to one male) (connected to أَعْرَضُوا - they turned away)
of a thunderbolt (possessed by عَادٍ وَثَمُودَ)
and Thamud (connecting it to عَادٍ mentioned before)
when (referring to the time when جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلرُّسُلُ - the messengers came to them)
she came to them (subject of إِذْ)
and from (connects to خَلْفِهِمْ - behind them)
they said (referring to the disbelievers responding to the messengers)
then as for (introduces what happened to عَادٌ)
of the truth (connected to بِغَيْرِ - without)
and they said (connecting to their previous action of being arrogant)
a strength/power (as a description of أَشَدُّ)
and did they not? (connects to يَرَوْا۟)
they see (in أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ - 'Do they not see?')
that/indeed (introduces the fact about اللَّهَ being stronger)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
he created them (referring to عَادٌ, the people of 'Ad)
from them (referring to عَادٌ, the people of 'Ad)
they deny/reject (the signs of Allah that they know are true)
so/then we sent (connected to previous statement)
upon them (referring to the people who rejected the message)
unfortunate (describing multiple days) - in genitive case
so that we make them taste (connected to أَرْسَلْنَا)
punishment (object of لِنُذِيقَهُمْ - so We may make them taste)
of the disgrace (part of عَذَابَ ٱلْخِزْىِ/punishment of disgrace)
and surely the punishment (subject of أَخْزَىٰ)
they are helped/supported/made victorious (negated by لا)
Thamud (subject of فَهَدَيْنٰهُمْ/so We guided them)
and so we guided them (after ثَمُودُ)
and then it (the blast) seized them (ثَمُودُ/Thamud)
they were (subject of يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)
they gain/earn (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
and we saved intensively (those who believed)
and on the day (when Allah's enemies are gathered)
is/will be gathered (passive voice, referring to أَعْدَآءُ 'enemies')
they are being arranged/distributed (the enemies of Allah)
when (connects حَتَّىٰٓ 'until' with مَا جَآءُوهَا 'they come to it')
that which (connects to جَآءُوهَا - they came to it)
they came to it (when they reached the Fire)
and their skins (as the doer of شَهِدَ)
with/by what (they used to do يَعْمَلُونَ)
they work/act/do (referring to their senses and skin testifying against them)
you all witnessed (addressing the skins of the disbelievers)
He made us speak (object of أَنطَقَ اللَّهُ)
you all were (addressing multiple people in وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ)
and not (connected to سَمْعُكُمْ - your hearing)
and but (connects while contrasting with وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ)
Allah (as the object being referred to in this ayah)
and that/this (pointing to something) for you all
he caused you all to be destroyed
they are/will be patient (if they are patient)
a dwelling/resting place (for لَّهُمْ - for them)
and if (connects to previous statement فَٱلنَّارُ مَثْوًى لَّهُمْ)
and we destined intensively (for them قُرَنَآءَ companions)
for/to them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
companions (as the object being assigned to them)
for them/to them (connected to قُرَنَآءَ - companions)
and it became firmly established (subject of عَلَيْهِمُ)
from (shows the origin of قَبْلِهِم - before them)
the jinn (in a group with الإِنس/humans)
and he said (subject of this sentence)
of the Quran (object of لِهٰذَا/to this)
you all defeat (referring to the disbelievers speaking in this verse)
and we will surely make taste (the disbelievers)
a punishment (object of فَلَنُذِيقَنَّ/We will make them taste)
worst (of what they used to do)
the one who/which (refers to those who disbelieved in كَفَرُوا)
they do/act/work (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in كَفَرُوا)
that (pointing to something far) (subject of جَزَآءُ)
for them (referring to أَعْدَآءِ ٱللَّهِ - the enemies of Allah)
in it (feminine singular, referring to النَّارُ/the Fire)
because of what (they used to يَجْحَدُونَ/deny)
with/in our signs (which يَجْحَدُونَ they deny)
they deny stubbornly (referring to the disbelievers denying Allah's signs)
our Lord! (calling out to our Lord)
show us! (command to someone to show us)
they both made us lose the right path (object of أَرِنَا - show us)
and the humankind (object of مِنَ - from)
we will put them both (the two misleaders mentioned in أَضَلَّانَا)
so that they both may be/become (among الْأَسْفَلِينَ - the lowest)
the lowest ones (acted on by ليكونا)
those who (subject of قَالُوا۟ - they said)
they said (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)
the angels (as the subject of تَتَنَزَّلُ - descend)
that not (introducing what the angels say to the believers)
and give good news! (command to multiple people) (connected to وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟)
with the garden/paradise (that was promised to you)
you (all) were (referring to those who were promised Paradise)
you (all) are being promised/warned (of الْجَنَّةِ - Paradise)
and for you all (referring to the believers being addressed)
in it (referring to الْءَاخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)
whatever (referring to the things تَشْتَهِىٓ desired by أَنفُسُكُمْ your souls)
you all desire/claim (what your souls desire)
and who/whoever (introduces the subject of أَحْسَنُ)
and he worked/did (subject of قَالَ - he said)
the ones who submit/surrender peacefully (plural) (object of مِنَ)
she/it (referring to الْحَسَنَةُ - the good deed)
better/best (than the bad deed mentioned before)
and then/and when (connecting to what follows)
close friend, protector (describing الَّذِى - the one who)
a close friend (like someone who has warmth/closeness towards another)
except (what comes after ذُو حَظٍّ عَظِيمٍ)
it is made to be received by her/it (doer)
of a great portion (possessed by ذُو)
he definitely provokes you (object of وَإِمَّا)
The All-Knowing One (Divine attribute of اللَّهِ)
and the moon (subject of لَا تَسْجُدُوا)
you (all) prostrate (after لَا meaning 'do not prostrate')
to/for the sun (object that should not be prostrated to)
and bow down! (command to many people)
your Lord (possessed by those near Him)
that you (object of تَرَى - you see)
upon it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
it (feminine) shook itself (referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
and she/it grew bigger (referring to الأرض/the earth)
he gave life to it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
surely the one who gives life
all-powerful (describing Allah's complete power over everything mentioned in the ayah)
or rather (connecting to أَفَمَن before it)
those who (plural - refers to كَفَرُوا۟ 'they disbelieved')
with/by the reminder/mention (object of كَفَرُوا - they disbelieved)
and indeed it (referring to the Quran)
absolutely not (negates يَأْتِيهِ - comes to it)
the falsehood (subject of يَأْتِيهِ - comes to it)
and not (negates يَأْتِيهِ - comes to it)
it is said (passive form of يَقُولُ)
to you (being told in يُقَالُ - it is said)
except (what comes after from مَّا يُقَالُ لَكَ - what is said to you)
to the messengers (object of قِيلَ - was said)
a forgiveness (possessed by رَبَّكَ - your Lord)
a Quran (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ - we made it)
it was thoroughly explained (referring to the verses/signs)
they are being called out (the disbelievers mentioned in previous ayah)
Moses (the one who was given الْكِتٰبَ)
the book (what was given to Moses)
then it was disagreed about (about الْكِتٰبَ - the Book)
in it (referring to الْكِتٰبَ, the Book)
surely it would have been decided
and indeed they (are) (subject of لَفِى شَكٍّ)
causing doubt (describes شَكٍّ/doubt, showing it follows مِن/from)
he did (subject of فَلِنَفْسِهِ - then it is for himself)
then against it (referring to the evil deed)
with/by an extremely unjust one (to العَبِيد - the servants)
to him (connected to يُرَدُّ - is returned)
it is returned/sent back (to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)
and what (introduces questions about تَخْرُجُ and تَحْمِلُ)
and what/whatever (introduces relative clause about things emerging)
she puts/places (referring to أُنثَىٰ - a female)
except, unless (excluding something from وَمَا تَحْمِلُ - and what carries)
where (asking about the location of شُرَكَآءِى)
and he lost his way (from عَنْهُم what they used to call upon)
what (that which they used to call upon)
of the good (thing/matter) (possessed by دُعَآءِ - supplication)
and if (connects to previous statement about not tiring of good)
touched/affected him intensely (referring to hardship affecting humans in this ayah)
then/so [he is] a despairing one (describing الْإِنسٰنُ/man)
a mercy (as the object being given)
he will most definitely say (in response to Allah's mercy)
for/to me (connected to عِندَهُۥ - with Him)
and not/and what (connects to لَيَقُولَنَّ - 'he will surely say')
the Hour (as object of أَظُنُّ - I think)
and if indeed (introduces a condition with emphasis)
for me, to me (connected to هٰذَا - this)
with Him (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and surely we will inform thoroughly (with strong emphasis)
they disbelieved (subject of فَلَنُنَبِّئَنَّ - We will surely inform)
they did/acted (referring to the disbelievers mentioned as الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)
and surely we will make them taste/experience
and when (connects to أَنْعَمْنَا - we bestow favors)
he turned away (from the blessings mentioned in أَنْعَمْنَا)
by his side (acted on by نَـَٔا)
and when (connects to مَسَّهُ - touches him)
so/then (he is) possessor of (دُعَآءٍ عَرِيضٍ - vast prayer)
he/it was (describing something in this ayah)
from (connects عِندِ with what comes before it)
you all rejected/denied (in response to قُلْ - say)
our signs (what we will show them)
until (connects to يَتَبَيَّنَ - it becomes clear)
it becomes clear (until it becomes clear to them that it is the truth)
for/to them (connected to يَتَبَيَّنَ - becomes clear)
the truth/reality (predicate of أَنَّهُ - that it is)
and has/did not...? (questioning what follows in يَكْفِ)
he suffices (in response to أَوَلَمْ - is it not sufficient?)
by your Lord (object of يَكْفِ - is sufficient)
All-Witnessing (describes Allah's attribute of witnessing over everything)
Now surely! (draws attention to إِنَّهُۥ that follows)
of the meeting (with رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
their Lord (the one who completely cares for and helps them grow)
All-Encompassing (a name of Allah, predicate of إِنَّهُۥ)
